description: “Cloudthief,” by Nathaniel Rich, follows a dispirited writer into a scheme to get rich and find romance along the way.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Famous Men,’ by Julie Buntin
description: Julie Buntin’s novel “Famous Men” complicates an old story with questions of ambition and consent.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Gospel According to Hobby Lobby,’ by Michael Blanding
book_title: ‘The Gospel According to Hobby Lobby,’ by Michael Blanding
description: A new book by Michael Blanding chronicles the history of Hobby Lobby and its billionaire founder’s campaign to promote conservative Christian values.
